title: Extracting Product Information from a Catalog
scenario: A company wants to extract product information from a catalog. The catalog includes tables with product descriptions, prices, and images. The user wants to extract a JSON object with the extracted product information and their descriptions.
constraints: Must handle multiple tables with different product information

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output extracts the correct product information and their descriptions
Check if the output preserves the original formatting
Check if the output length is within the specified limit (350 characters)
